Vendored browser fixture assets.

These files are served by the dynamic integration-test fixture so browser tests
do not depend on public CDN availability at runtime.

- `bootstrap.min.css`: Bootstrap 4.3.1 from `cdn.jsdelivr.net`
- `react.production.min.js`: React 16.14.0 from `unpkg.com`
- `react-dom.production.min.js`: ReactDOM 16.14.0 from `unpkg.com`
- `history.min.js`: history 4.9.0 from `unpkg.com`
- `react-router.js`: React Router 4.3.1 from `unpkg.com`
- `react-router-dom.js`: React Router DOM 4.3.1 from `unpkg.com`
- `react-bootstrap.min.js`: React Bootstrap 2.10.10 from `unpkg.com`
